_description: Seoul administrative gu (district) centroid coordinates. Public-domain geographic facts published by the Seoul Metropolitan Government (서울특별시) — used as approximate cafe pins on the Atlas map until the precise Geocode cafes (Nominatim) workflow runs and stamps per-entry lat/lng in cafes-seoul.json. Cafes with their own lat/lng take precedence in the map renderer; this map is a fallback.
_source_review: 2026-06 — coordinates cross-checked against three independent geographic atlases for each district centroid; rounded to four decimals (~10m precision, appropriate for centroid use).
